title: Prefer passing a list to numpy array over passing a generator
description: Avoid using generators when passing data to numpy arrays as it may result in poor performance.
message: Prefer passing a list to numpy array over passing a generator.
impact: Performance issues may arise due to the creation and consumption of temporary objects.
recommendation: Use lists to pass data to numpy arrays.

noncompliant.code:
import numpy as np
arr = np.fromiter((x for x in range(10)), dtype=int)
noncompliant.description: Creates a numpy array from a generator.

compliant.code:
import numpy as np
arr = np.array(list(range(10)), dtype=int)
compliant.description: Creates a numpy array from a list.

why_is_this_an_issue: Generators create and consume temporary objects, leading to poor performance.
how_to_fix: Use lists to pass data to numpy arrays.

logic.new_check_type_doc: Checks if the expression value is of type GeneratorExpression

function_code:
def check_generator_expression(node):
    return any(isinstance(expr, ast.GeneratorExpression) for expr in node['expression'])

metadata.title: Prefer passing a list to numpy array over passing a generator
